diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper exports Factory class and createMiddleware factory function for combining multiple handlers.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides functions to get matched routes, route paths, and base paths from request context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, WSContext, createWSMessageEvent, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper defines WebSocket upgrade functionality with events and context management.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides functions to read, set, generate, and delete cookies with support for signed cookies.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates a test client for invoking Hono app via HTTP.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides runtime detection utilities for different execution environments.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for generating scoped CSS on client/server with dynamic class names and styles.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, IS_CSS_ESCAPED, rawCssString, toHash, normalizeLabel, isValidClassName, isValidKeyframeName, defaultOnInvalidSlug, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: None (utility module)
+- Neighbor files: ./index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common utilities defining symbols and functions used by CSS helper.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers, ../../utils/http-status, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests with header control and RFC 9110 compliance.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for inspecting and displaying application routes.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html, ../../helper/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper escapes values and interpolates them into HTML content.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG helper exports static site generation functionality and related middleware.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, defaultExtensionMap, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, TOSSGResult, FileSystemModule
+- Reads as: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ./utils, ./middleware, ./plugins, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../hono, ../../types, ./utils, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG core module handles fetching and saving static content to filesystem for static generation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ./index.ts, ./ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities for path manipulation and route filtering for static generation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams, SSGParamsMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/types, ./utils, ./index.ts, ./ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware handles static generation parameters and runtime checks for SSG context.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports streaming response helpers for SSE and Text content types.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Basic streaming response helper using TransformStream and callbacks.
+
+## src/hel
